metadata.title: States PCS: Goa GK Questions for Goa Public Service Commission Exams

questions.question: Which traditional Goan festival is deeply rooted in pre-Portuguese, ancient tribal and Hindu customs?
questions.explanation: Shigmo is Goa’s ancient spring festival with tribal and Hindu origins, predating Portuguese rule and reflecting agrarian traditions.

questions.question: Which ancient cave complex in Goa is known for its early religious activity and Buddhist influence?
questions.explanation: Arvalem Caves, dating to the 6th century, are among Goa’s earliest rock-cut sanctuaries and display Buddhist influence.

questions.question: Which prominent Indian emperor’s southern expansion likely brought his influence to Goa?
questions.explanation: Harsha’s empire extended into the Deccan; inscriptions and texts indicate indirect contact or cultural impact on Goa.

questions.question: Which ancient land grant system was prevalent in Goa during the rule of the Kadamba dynasty?
questions.explanation: The agrahara system, involving land grants to Brahmins for settlement and religious practices, was common in Goa under the Kadambas.
